response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio perfectly matches the song 'Ashita wa Getsuyoubi' by Hoshimachi Suisei provided in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics, repeating the cycle to match the video's musical loop. Manual transcription and translation were applied to prominent on-screen text (fan signs and phone messages) during instrumental sections. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onsets. Visual text subtitles were timed to their on-screen duration during gaps in vocals to maintain the fan-montage context. Aggressive truncation was used to ensure seamless transitions between rapid phrases.

subtitles.original: あしたは月曜日
subtitles.english: Tomorrow is Monday

subtitles.original: 眠たいな 行きたくないな
subtitles.english: I want to sleep, I don't want to go

subtitles.original: でも行かなきゃ いかなきゃ
subtitles.english: But I have to go, I have to go

subtitles.original: あしたは月曜日
subtitles.english: It's Monday tomorrow

subtitles.original: もうすでにもうすでに
subtitles.english: I'm already feeling tired, I'm already feeling like...

subtitles.original: 気が重いな 気が重いな
subtitles.english: I want to go back to sleep, I want to go back to sleep

subtitles.original: 起き上がりたくないな
subtitles.english: I don't want to wake up

subtitles.original: ベッドから出たくないな
subtitles.english: I don't want to leave my bed

subtitles.original: でも目覚ましは鳴るし
subtitles.english: But the alarm clock is ringing

subtitles.original: 世界は僕を呼ぶんだ
subtitles.english: And the world is calling me

subtitles.original: あしたは月曜日
subtitles.english: Tomorrow is Monday

subtitles.original: がんばろう がんばろう
subtitles.english: Let's do our best, let's do our best
